endpoints.description: Adds a message to the transit object referenced by the given object ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WALLETOBJECTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WALLETOBJECTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.
